title: Delete POI options — toolbar button and Layers panel context menu
capture_instructions: Split or composite view showing two deletion paths. Primary: the toolbar Delete POI button highlighted (hover state). Secondary: the Layers panel sidebar with the POI Marker row three-dot menu open, showing 'Delete' as a menu item. If a composite is not possible, capture the Layers panel context menu open with Delete visible.
ui_state: POI present in scene; Layers panel three-dot context menu open on POI Marker row, showing Delete option
